children.name: webkit
ui/studio.spec.ts
Studio Generation (mocked)
generation trigger transitions to rendering state @smoke @ui @regression
polling starts after generation trigger @smoke @ui
Studio Page
HQ warning should be hidden when toggle is off after reload @ui @regression
generate button disabled when prompt empty @smoke @ui
generate button enables on input, disables on clear @smoke @ui
video count spinner defaults to 3 with min=1 max=5 @smoke @ui
duration dropdown has 4s, 8s (default), 12s @smoke @ui
button text reflects video count @smoke @ui
aspect ratio dropdown: Landscape (default), Portrait @smoke @ui
HQ mode label and toggle visible @smoke @ui
a11y/page-scans.spec.ts
Accessibility — WCAG 2.1 AA Scans
Stock Footage page should have no a11y violations @a11y @regression
Studio page should have no a11y violations @a11y @regression
History page should have no a11y violations @a11y @regression
api/generation-pipeline.spec.ts
Generation Pipeline API
POST /api/generate-video with empty prompt returns 400 @api @smoke
GET /api/video-status without taskId returns 400 @api @smoke
GET /api/video-history returns videos array with expected shape @api @smoke @regression
GET /api/video-history with filter=mine returns cookie-filtered videos @api
POST /api/generate-video with valid payload returns 200 + taskId @api @smoke @regression
GET /api/video-status with valid taskId returns status object @api
Generation Pipeline — Data Integrity
video history should have valid aspect_ratio values @api @regression
video-status should return sanitized error for invalid taskId @api @regression
generate-video should include rate limiting headers @api @regression
innocent short prompts should not be flagged by moderation @api @regression
api/negative-paths.spec.ts
Negative Paths — API Down & Error States
studio handles generate-video 500 gracefully @ui @regression
studio handles video-status polling timeout @ui @regression
studio handles generate-video network failure @ui @regression
stock footage handles parse failure @ui @regression
Negative Paths — API Contract Edge Cases
generate-video with invalid aspect_ratio returns error @api
generate-video with invalid duration returns error @api
video-history with negative offset returns error or empty @api
video-history with huge limit is handled @api
api/prompt-edge-cases.spec.ts
Prompt Edge Cases — Security & Encoding
SQL injection string is accepted without server error @api @security
XSS script tag is accepted without server error @api @security
XSS img tag is accepted without server error @api @security
XSS payload in history is rendered as text, not executed @security
unicode prompt is accepted @api
emoji prompt is accepted @api
whitespace-only prompt returns 400 @api
very long prompt is handled without 500 @api
path traversal in prompt does not cause server error @api @security
template literal in prompt does not leak env vars @api @security
api/security-headers.spec.ts
Security Headers Audit
response includes Content-Security-Policy header @api @security
response includes X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff @api @security
response includes X-Frame-Options @api @security
response includes Strict-Transport-Security @api @security
previz_user_id cookie has Secure flag @security
previz_user_id cookie has HttpOnly flag @security
previz_user_id cookie has SameSite attribute @security
API endpoints do not expose server version headers @api @security
ui/history.spec.ts
History Page
page loads with Video History heading @smoke @ui
Your Videos tab shows videos for current cookie @smoke @ui
All Videos tab shows videos with count > 0 @smoke @ui
video cards display status badges @ui
completed videos have playable video elements @ui @regression
Load More button appears and loads additional videos @ui
failed videos show error message @ui
History Page — Fresh Session
Your Videos tab shows empty state for fresh browser @ui
ui/navigation.spec.ts
Navigation
homepage loads with title and heading @smoke @ui
navigate Studio → Stock Footage → History @smoke @ui
logo returns to Studio from any page @smoke @ui
all 3 nav links visible on every page @smoke @ui
unknown route returns 404 @smoke @ui
ui/stock-footage-edge.spec.ts
Stock Footage — Script Parsing Edge Cases
empty script keeps parse button disabled @ui
whitespace-only script keeps parse button disabled @ui
single word input parses without crash @ui
text without scene headings still parses @ui
dialogue-heavy script extracts shots @ui
unicode screenplay text parses without errors @ui
malformed headings still parse or fail gracefully @ui
special characters in screenplay parse correctly @ui
ui/stock-footage.spec.ts
Stock Footage Page
parse button disabled when textarea empty, enabled when filled @smoke @ui
default aspect ratio is Portrait @smoke @ui
video settings present with correct defaults @smoke @ui
Stock Footage — Script Parsing
script parsing shows loading then parsed shots @smoke @ui
two-scene script extracts multiple shots with editable prompts @ui
shot headings show correct numbering @ui
generate button appears with correct video count @ui
start over button resets to input state @ui
